title: Tangy Crispy Chocolate Crumbe
description: A tangy and crispy chocolate crumble recipe that combines simple ingredients for a romantic and keto-friendly dessert.
instructions: Grease a baking dish with coconut oil or line it with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, combine coconut sugar, heavy cream, and unsalted butter. Stir until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
Add in dark chocolate and stir until melted and fully incorporated into the mixture. The mixture will be thick and syrupy in texture.
Stir in almond flour and sea salt until a crumbly consistency is achieved.
Transfer the mixture to the greased baking dish or onto a silicone sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top. Remove from oven and let cool before garnishing with fresh mint leaves if desired.
